description: A screenshot of a long multi-paragraph social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The black-on-white text praises law enforcement, Border Patrol and ICE, criticizes Democrats over funding and immigration, references a budget bill and the midterms, and is signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; Republicans fully support our Great Men and Women of Law Enforcement; WIN THE MIDTERMS
